001package net.pl3x.guithium.api.gui.texture;
002
003import com.google.common.base.Preconditions;
004import net.pl3x.guithium.api.json.JsonSerializable;
005import net.pl3x.guithium.api.key.Key;
006import net.pl3x.guithium.api.key.Keyed;
007import org.jetbrains.annotations.NotNull;
008import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;
009
010/**
011 * Represents an image texture.
012 */
013public class Texture extends Keyed implements JsonSerializable {
014    /**
015     * Mojang's default dirt texture used in options screens.
016     */
017    public static final Texture DIRT = Texture.of("minecraft:dirt", "textures/gui/options_background.png");
018
019    private final String url;
020
021    /**
022     * Create a new image texture.
023     *
024     * @param key Unique identifying key
025     * @param url URL or resource location
026     */
027    protected Texture(@NotNull Key key, @NotNull String url) {
028        super(key);
029        Preconditions.checkNotNull(url, "Url cannot be null");
030        this.url = url;
031    }
032
033    /**
034     * Create a new image texture.
035     *
036     * @param id  Unique identifying key
037     * @param url URL or resource location
038     * @return new Texture
039     */
040    @NotNull
041    public static Texture of(@NotNull String id, @NotNull String url) {
042        return of(Key.of(id), url);
043    }
044
045    /**
046     * Create a new image texture.
047     *
048     * @param key Unique identifying key
049     * @param url URL or resource location
050     * @return new Texture
051     */
052    @NotNull
053    public static Texture of(@NotNull Key key, @NotNull String url) {
054        return new Texture(key, url);
055    }
056
057    /**
058     * Get the URL or resource location to the texture.
059     * <p>
060     * Values starting with <code>http://</code> or <code>https://</code> will be retrieved from the internet.
061     * <p>
062     * For vanilla textures, just specify the resource location with or without the <code>minecraft:</code> namespace.
063     * <p>
064     * For textures provided by other client mods, just specify the resource location with their mod id as the namespace.
065     *
066     * @return URL or resource location of the texture
067     */
068    @NotNull
069    public String getUrl() {
070        return this.url;
071    }
072
073    @Override
074    public boolean equals(@Nullable Object obj) {
075        if (!super.equals(obj)) {
076            return false;
077        }
078        Texture other = (Texture) obj;
079        return getUrl().equals(other.getUrl());
080    }
081
082    @Override
083    public int hashCode() {
084        // pacifies codefactor.io
085        return super.hashCode();
086    }
087}
